nasb.text: Your house and your kingdom shall endure before Me forever; your throne shall be established forever.” ’ ”

esv.text: And your house and your kingdom shall be made sure forever before me.  Your throne shall be established forever.’”

cnv.text: 你的家和你的王國，也必在我的面前永遠堅定，你的王位也必永遠堅立。’”

ccb.text: 你的家和你的国必在我面前永远坚立，你的王位必永远稳固。’”
